summary: Scheduled Reports feature testing completed. Backend: 22/22 tests PASSED (100%). Frontend: All E2E tests passed - Reports tab visible for admins, Configure panel with frequency toggle (weekly/monthly), 5 section checkboxes, active/paused toggle, Generate Now creates reports with PDF download, report list with expand/collapse preview showing data snapshot cards.

issues: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be child of <select>/<option> - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality (carried over from previous iterations)

critical_code_review_comments: Good: GET /api/organizations/{org_id}/reports/sections returns 5 sections (activity, notarizations, members, webhooks, billing) with key, label, description
Good: POST /api/organizations/{org_id}/reports/config creates/updates config with frequency (weekly/monthly), sections, is_active
Good: GET /api/organizations/{org_id}/reports/config returns current config or {configured: false}
Good: Validation: frequency must be weekly/monthly (400 for invalid)
Good: Validation: sections must be valid keys (400 for invalid)
Good: Validation: at least one section required (400 for empty)
Good: POST /api/organizations/{org_id}/reports/generate creates PDF using reportlab and returns report record with data_snapshot
Good: GET /api/organizations/{org_id}/reports returns paginated list (excludes data_snapshot for performance)
Good: GET /api/organizations/{org_id}/reports/{id} returns full report detail including data_snapshot
Good: GET /api/organizations/{org_id}/reports/{id}/download returns PDF file with correct content-type
Good: DELETE /api/organizations/{org_id}/reports/{id} removes report record and PDF file from disk
Good: All endpoints require admin/owner role (403 for non-admins)
Good: data_snapshot contains aggregated data for all configured sections (activity.total_events, members.total_active, webhooks.success_rate, billing.total_revenue)
Good: Frontend Reports tab is permission-gated by 'org:settings' permission
Good: Frontend shows schedule status ('Generating weekly reports with 5 sections (active)')
Good: Configure panel has frequency toggle (Weekly/Monthly), status toggle (Active/Paused), 5 section checkboxes with icons
Good: Generated reports list shows report type (7-Day/30-Day), timestamp, section count, PDF download button, delete button
Good: Report expandable preview shows data snapshot cards (Activity events, Notarizations documents, Members active, Webhooks delivery rate, Revenue)
Good: Generate Now button creates new report and shows 'Report Generated' toast

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all scheduled reports UI features working correctly

seed_data_creation: Generated TEST reports during testing. Multiple reports exist in the system from pytest runs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Scheduled Reports feature fully working. 5 report sections: activity, notarizations, members, webhooks, billing. Config supports weekly/monthly frequency with is_active flag. Reports are generated using reportlab with formatted tables for each section. Background scheduler (start_report_scheduler) runs hourly to auto-generate reports based on config. Frontend Reports tab at /organizations shows config panel, reports list with expand/collapse preview cards. PDF download works correctly. Admin-only access enforced.
